name: loom
description: Drive Loom — an AI-operable HTTP/HTTPS debugging proxy for macOS — over MCP. Inspect captured flows, replay requests with overrides, and mock / map / rewrite / block / delay traffic with rules. The MCP server is hosted by the running Loom app (HTTP on 127.0.0.1:9092); this plugin connects to it and ships a skill explaining the tools. Launch the Loom app for the tools to work.
